"'''Equipment'''" is a short story written by [[Matthew Stover]]. It was originally published in the ''[[Star Wars: Short Story Collection]]'' in [[July]] [[2003]]. ''Equipment'' was offered as a free download on [[StarWars.com]], and was also later included in the paperback edition of [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']], written by [[Matthew Stover]] and published by [[Del Rey]] in April 2004, and the republishing in 2021 as part of ''[[The Essential Legends Collection]]''. An unabridged recording is included in the [[Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)|unabridged audiobook]].

The story is "a personal account of the sub-orbital action at [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]], as reported by Auxiliary Heavy-Weapons Specialist [[Seven-Four|CT-6/774]]."

It explains the clone troopers' motto, "Take care of your equipment, and your equipment will take care of you." This motto comes to fruition when, even after their [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] gunship has been destroyed, they use what resources they have left to fight to the end.
